prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 3B (CJXB)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 400 HP and 380 lb-ft on 93 octane with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** turbocharger (0.83 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel), **APR High-Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP)** with **Bosch 0261002037** injectors (1,300cc/min), and **APR Catted Downpipe** (76mm diameter, 300-cell catalytic converter)

KW Suspension **Clubsport 3-Way Adjustable Coilovers** (rebound, compression, and preload damping) with **H&R 25mm Front / 20mm Rear Anti-Roll Bars** and **034 Motorsport Density Line Subframe Collars** to eliminate subframe deflection under hard cornering

Brembo **GT 6-Piston Front / 4-Piston Rear Big Brake Kit** (380mm front rotors with **2-piece floating hats**, 355mm rear rotors) paired with **Ferodo DS2500** race pads and **Goodridge G-Stop 600°C Braided Stainless Steel Brake Lines** for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Rocket Bunny **V3 Widebody Kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite Wrap** and **Vortex Generator** on the roof for aerodynamic stability at high speeds

OEM+ **VW Racing Line Carbon Fiber Mirror Caps** and **APR Carbon Fiber Front Lip** (with integrated **LED DRLs**), paired with **Hella Pagid Super Yellow Headlight Bulbs** and **Morimoto XB LED Fog Lights** for aggressive lighting

OZ Racing **Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET40** wheels (staggered setup: 245/35 R19 front, 265/30 R19 rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect** tires, wrapped in **custom gold/piano black powder coat** and fitted with **Hankook Ventus R-S4** semi-slick tires for track days
